name: Texas

annual_report.name: Franchise Tax Report
annual_report.notes: Most small LLCs (under ~$2.47M gross revenue) pay $0 in franchise tax but must still file the annual report. No fee for the report itself.

registered_agent.notes: Must have a registered agent with a physical TX street address.

state_tax.notes: Texas has no personal income tax and most small LLCs pay $0 franchise tax. One of the most business-friendly states.

notes: Texas is one of the most founder-friendly states: no personal income tax, low franchise tax burden for small businesses, reasonable filing fees.
